citation_and_locator: Wong, Anita Mei-Yin. 2023. Understanding Development and Disorder in Cantonese Using Language Sample Analysis. Routledge; GACS conjunction-pair inventory p. 62
what_it_supports: Explicitly lists Cantonese `就算…都…` as “even if … still.”

limit: Lexicographic examples do not establish exhaustive modality, ordering, productivity, or discourse commitments.
